channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Trolley abandoned, 22nd April
item.description:
It's blocking most of the path, making it less accessible to the public. The road is not a safe alternative for the elderly and disabled.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Union Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The whole road is full of potholes he needs re surfacing, 22nd April
item.description:
The whole road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Rowanfield Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham

item.title: Loose copings on wall, 22nd April
item.description:
Sorry not sure if this is the right section to report this. Copings loose and have been moved on wall outside Winstonion Park . Concerned might be used as missiles to damage cars.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Market Street, St Paul’s, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sandbag left behind, 22nd April
item.description:
Sandbag left behind from recent roadworks, on wall by the bridge park side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Market Street, St Paul’s, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Broken glass on path, 22nd April
item.description:
Glass on path under bridge where cars where broken into
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Market Street, St Paul’s, Cheltenham

item.title: Weeds etc around safety barrier adjacent to Brockworth footpath 57 on Ermin st, 22nd April
item.description:
Significant weed growth in pavement surface underneath safety barrier - this is unsightly and also narrowing available pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Ermin Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury

By the bollard outside the new shop Koco Bloom

item.title: Fly tipping in ditch, 22nd April
item.description:
Boot or Van load of rubbish dumped in the ditch on the side of the road nearest the motorway

item.title: Pothole outside Glenhurst Villa, 22nd April
item.description:
///agree.tunnel.muddy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Dunalley Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping of clothes and household goods, 22nd April
item.description:
People keep dumping bags and bags of clothes and other household goods by these clothes recycling bins in the Bath Terrace Car Park off Commercial Street - they attract local scavengers and they blow into neighbouring homes gardens. This is an ongoing issue. Action needs taking. Today more dumping of items and blowing all around car park, road and gardens.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bath Terrace, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Lady says the signs are sending cars down Kidnappers lane when the road is closed.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 22nd April
item.description:
The tree is on Shelley road on the pavement. It is a small tree but growing at a slant towards the road.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road closure signs at junction and stating closed 27th April but the road is closed now., 22nd April
item.description:
Confusing signage due to tree works and vehicles are turning in the Vineries.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kidnappers Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Information board identifying emergency contact company/number not displayed

item.title: Resurfacing work is taking place in Swindon Lane. This has involved relaying and raising drain covers as well as tarmacing. During these processes tarmac, today, has been laid to such a depth that it reaches the top of a kerb stone as shown in the photographs. There is therefore no gully at the edge of the road to take surface water. The gully is therefore blocked and it is inevitable that surface water will flow down the drive to this house causing a flooding issue. There is a minimal gap between the new road surface and the other kerb stones adjacent. While contractors are on site, it seems sensible for these issues to be dealt now., 22nd April
item.description:
Kerb outside of The Apiary, Swindon Lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swindon Lane, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Some fix but not all holes have been repaired - makes no sense to not repair all. They still damage the car, 22nd April
item.description:
Mini roundabout with Holy Trinity church on left. this side of the road is worse than the right. Some fix has been carried out but not all holes have been repaired and it is still bumpy and lumpy going across this section of road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Cheltenham Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post with the parking restrictions details was removed months ago and has not been replaced, leading to vehicles (including vans) parking for days at a time., 22nd April
item.description:
114 Hewlett Road. Also the double yellow lines between 114 and Jersey Avenue are significantly obscured or missing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 116, Hewlett Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 22nd April
item.description:
ENDW to install correct TM men ahead at work, footpath closed, footpath closed ahead signage

item.title: You tried to fix this yesterday but it is still very bad, very bumpy and will come apart in the next few weeks, please have a look at it yourself thanks, 22nd April
item.description:
Outside the side door of the greyhound pub
